Class SystemManager

java.lang.Object
model.SystemManager
public class SystemManager extends Object
Manages the current user's session and provides access to data trackers. Handles loading and saving of user-specific data including budget, expenses, income, and reminders.

  • Method Details

    • loginUser

      public static void loginUser(User user)
      Logs in the given user, initializes trackers, and loads their data.
      Parameters:
      user - The user to log in.

    • logoutUser

      public static void logoutUser()
      Logs out the current user, saves their data, and clears trackers from memory.

    • getCurrentUser

      public static User getCurrentUser()
      Gets the currently logged-in user.
      Returns:
      The current user, or null if no user is logged in.

    • saveUserData

      public static void saveUserData()
      Saves the current user's data to disk.

    • isUserLoggedIn

      public static boolean isUserLoggedIn()
      Checks if a user is currently logged in.
      Returns:
      true if a user is logged in, false otherwise.

    • getBudgetTracker

      public static BudgetTracker getBudgetTracker()
      Returns the BudgetTracker instance.
      Returns:
      The singleton BudgetTracker instance.

    • getExpenseTracker

      public static ExpenseTracker getExpenseTracker()
      Returns the ExpenseTracker instance.
      Returns:
      The singleton ExpenseTracker instance.

    • getIncomeTracker

      public static IncomeTracker getIncomeTracker()
      Returns the IncomeTracker instance.
      Returns:
      The singleton IncomeTracker instance.

    • getReminderTracker

      public static ReminderTracker getReminderTracker()
      Returns the ReminderTracker instance.
      Returns:
      The singleton ReminderTracker instance.
